mapper.select: select h.hotelno, NVL(rh.realhotelname, h.hotelName) AS realhotelname, NVL(rh.roadaddr, h.address) AS roadaddr from hotel h left join realhotel rh on h.realhotelno = rh.realhotelno where h.hotelno=#{hotelno}
select hotelFileName as roomfilename from hotel_image where hotelno=#{hotelno}
select roomno, roomname,roomprice,bedno,infoRoom,checkInDate,checkOutDate from hotel_room where hotelno=#{hotelno}

select placeName, placeAddress, placeOpenTime, placeCloseTime from place p, (select state from hotel h, realhotel r where h.realhotelno = r.realhotelno and hotelno = #{hotelno}) h where p.placeAddress like '%' || h.state || '%'
select count(reviewno) from review where hotelno= #{hotelno}
mapper.update:
update review set reviewContent =#{reviewContent}
where reviewNo = #{reviewNo}
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_room(roomNo, hotelNo, roomName, roomPrice, bedNo, infoRoom, checkInDate, checkOutDate, roomRegistDate) values (hotel_room_seq.nextval, #{hotelno}, #{roomname}, #{roomprice}, #{bedno}, #{infoRoom}, #{checkInDate}, #{checkOutDate}, sysdate)
insert into hotel_image(hotelImageId, hotelNo, hotelFileName) values (hotel_image_seq.nextval, #{hotelNo}, #{hotelFileName})
mapper.select: select reasonNo, hotelNo, reasonTitle, reasonContent, reasonImage, regDate from hotel_reason where hotelNo = #{hotelNo} order by reasonNo asc
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_reason(reasonNo, hotelNo, reasonTitle, reasonContent, reasonImage, regDate) values (hotel_reason_seq.nextval, #{hotelNo}, #{reasonTitle}, #{reasonContent}, #{reasonImage}, sysdate)
